description: An increment/decrement stepper control. Current value is a Double stored as the element value.

range.description: Clamping range; omit for unconstrained stepping

label.description: Static label text; ignored when labelFormat is set

labelFormat.description: printf-style format embedding current value (e.g. 'Count: %.0f'); takes precedence over label

value.description: Current stepper value; set via setElementValue
